title: Window Layout
description:
Window Layout

[Save Window Layout] Command (Window Menu)

Names and saves the current window layout information. Execute [Apply Window Layout] to read the saved layout information and restore the window layout.

You can save up to eight layouts.

[Apply Window Layout] Command (Window Menu)

Reads the window layout information saved in [Save Window Layout] to restore the window layout.

[Manage Window Layouts] Command (Window Menu)

Renames or deletes saved window layouts.

Item	Description

Rename	Renames
		 the window layout.

Delete	Deletes
		 the window layout.

Close	Closes
		 the [Manage Window Layouts] dialog.

[Reset Window Layout] Command (Window Menu)

You can reset the window layout to the default setting. You can choose from [Standard] or [Layout for multiple displays].

For details, refer to 5.3.2  Reset Window Layout.
